sentences.arabic: اسْتَيْقَظَتْ مَرْيَمُ مُبَكِّرًا وَنَظَرَتْ مِنَ النَّافِذَةِ.
sentences.translation: Merjema se probudila rano i pogledala kroz prozor.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam woke up early and looked out the window.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ السَّمَاءُ صَافِيَةً وَالطَّيْرُ يُغَرِّدُ فِي الأَشْجَارِ.
sentences.translation: Nebo je bilo vedro i ptice su pjevale na drveću.
sentences.translationEn: The sky was clear and birds were singing in the trees.

sentences.translation: Obukla se i sišla da doručkuje.
sentences.translationEn: She got dressed and went downstairs to have breakfast.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لِأُمِّهَا إِنَّ الْيَوْمَ سَيَكُونُ يَوْمًا رَائِعًا.
sentences.translation: Rekla je majci da će dan biti divan.
sentences.translationEn: She told her mother that today would be a wonderful day.
